narrative:
Xenia township has 4,400 registered voters, with 51.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 36.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 24.5 percentage points.
